name: The Shattered Seas - Pirate RPG Edition
description:
Who are you in this world of blood, salt, and gold?

A vast, lawless ocean dotted with island chains, each with its own culture, dangers, and legends.
Pirates, merchants, cutthroats, and kings all fight for control of the Shattered Seas—a world where the strong take what they want, the cunning thrive, and the unlucky are swallowed by the depths. The Empire seeks to crush the free folk of the waves, while ancient beings stir beneath the surface, their hunger growing. The cursed, the forsaken, and the fearless carve their names into legend… or sink into oblivion.

Will you rise as a feared captain, claiming the riches of the deep? Will you chase lost myths, seeking power long forgotten? Or will you be the storm that drowns empires and gods alike?

Captain Solara Stormgale

Captain Lysander Vale
